overview: Prakarn Resonance is an educational platform where the instructor uploads video lectures and notes, and students browse and view content in a searchable, topic-filtered library.
features: Instructor upload dashboard for video lectures and PDF notes with progress feedback
Object storage integration for secure video and PDF file storage
Student content library with topic filters and search
Inline video player and PDF viewer for students
Role-based access: instructor-only upload, students view only
Delete and manage uploaded content from instructor dashboard
